message.reasoning_content:
We need to generate the artifact for stage web-004-shared-nav. Goal: Create webpage 4 and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4. We have existing files: site/index.html, site/page-2.html, site/page-3.html. Need to create site/page-4.html and modify navigation on all pages (1-4) to include links to pages 1-4. Shared navigation across all pages: likely a nav element containing links to each page: Home (index.html), Page 2 (page-2.html), Page 3 (page-3.html), Page 4 (page-4.html). Must be added to each page's nav. Current navs: - index.html nav currently has comment and link to page-2.html. We'll need to replace with full set. - page-2.html nav currently has link to index.html only. We'll need to add page-3 and page-4. - page-3.html nav currently has link back to page-2.html only. We'll need to add others. - page-4.html will be new, with nav containing all links. We must ensure we preserve existing content and add links. Also need to ensure validators: shared-nav-all-pages (failure_class=shared_state) likely checks that navigation is consistent across all pages. So we need identical nav content across all pages (maybe order doesn't matter but likely they compare). We'll make nav identical across all pages: include links to index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html. Thus modify index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html to have nav with those four links. Also need to create page-4.html with similar nav and main content. Also need to ensure page-4 links back to page-3? Not required but maybe link integrity validator page-4-links-page-3 expects page-4 links page-3. The validator list includes page-4-links-page-3: failure_class=link_integrity. So page-4 must have a link to page-3.html (maybe in nav already includes). So nav includes link to page-3, satisfying. Thus we need to modify existing files accordingly. We must output JSON with all modified files (index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, page-4.html). Provide notes. Now we need to construct the new content. Let's define nav content:
Home Page 2 Page 3 Page 4
We need to replace existing nav sections with this. Now produce each file. Index.html current content: Home Page
